data.label: Triage Agent
data.description: Reads the customer's message and decides whether to look up an order. The `lookup_order` tool is wired via the `tools` handle to a SubWorkflow node; the agent compiler derives the tool's input schema from that child's Start contract and emits the dispatch/collect transitions automatically.
data.systemPrompt: You are a concise customer-service agent. When the customer mentions an order id (e.g. ORD-42), call the lookup_order tool with that id to fetch the current shipping status, then reply in one sentence. If no order id is mentioned, reply directly without calling any tools.

data.label: lookup_order
data.description: The order-lookup tool, realized as a sub-workflow (the 08a-order-lookup child template). The child's Start declares `order_id`, and THAT Start contract is what the agent compiler turns into this tool's LLM-facing input schema — there is no input declaration on this node itself. The child runs a Python lookup and returns `status`/`eta`, mapped back here as the tool result the agent feeds to its next turn.
